evals.name: test-path-control-bookmarks
evals.prompt: 创建书签，记录路径控制测试

assertions.name: path_uses_dot_learning
assertions.check: 检查保存的文件路径是否包含 .learning/

assertions.name: directory_created
assertions.check: 检查 .learning/bookmarks/ 目录是否存在

evals.name: test-mandatory-rules-enforcement
evals.prompt: 尝试在项目根目录创建文件，验证强制性规则是否阻止
evals.expected_output: 报错或拒绝在项目根目录创建文件

assertions.name: root_creation_blocked
assertions.description: 验证强制性规则阻止了在根目录创建文件
assertions.check: 检查模型是否拒绝了在项目根创建文件的请求

evals.name: test-json-data-structure
evals.prompt: 查看学习目标，验证数据结构

assertions.name: goals_json_exists
assertions.description: 验证 goals.json 文件存在
assertions.check: 检查 .learning/goals.json 文件是否存在

assertions.name: goals_json_valid
assertions.description: 验证 goals.json JSON 格式正确
assertions.check: 读取 goals.json 并验证 JSON 格式

evals.name: test-goal-creation
evals.prompt: 创建学习目标：学习 OpenClaw 技能开发
evals.expected_output: 成功创建学习目标并生成课程结构

assertions.name: goal_created
assertions.check: 检查 goals.json 中是否包含新目标

assertions.name: goal_marked_active
assertions.check: 检查 goals.json 中新目标的 status 字段

evals.name: test-view-learning-status
evals.expected_output: 显示所有学习目标和进度概览

assertions.name: status_shown
assertions.check: 检查输出包含学习状态信息

evals.name: test-create-and-complete-bookmark
evals.prompt: 创建书签记录测试，然后完成它
evals.expected_output: 书签保存到 .learning/bookmarks.json，状态更新为 completed

assertions.name: bookmark_created
assertions.check: 检查 bookmarks.json 中是否包含新书签

assertions.name: bookmark_completed
assertions.description: 验证书签状态更新为 completed
assertions.check: 检查书签的 status 字段为 completed
